title: Pasania sieboldiana

The plant is rich in health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Pasania sieboldiana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Pasania sieboldiana is commonly prepared as a decoction or tea, as well as in the form of tinctures and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
